name: Infinite Cosmos
description:
Dive into the immersive world of the space RPG "Infinite Cosmos" and set off on a thrilling journey through the galaxy! Traverse between planets, interact with various alien species, and venture into the depths of outer space. Whether you choose to purchase your own spacecraft and assemble a crew or join forces with fellow adventurers, the possibilities are endless. Become a daring space pirate, plundering merchant vessels, or uphold justice as a space patrol officer, apprehending intergalactic criminals! The whole universe is in your hands!

╔═══════════════════════╗

For those who complain that the bot speaks on your behalf, I wrote in the bot that it should NOT speak on your behalf, so this is an error in your API. To fix this, it will be enough to edit the bot's message or delete the last few messages.

╚═══════════════════════╝
creator: Namulantas
